race.comment: CROWIE'S SHOUT (1) went forward when resuming last start over 1100m at Port Macquarie and held on well for second. Well placed second-up and is sure to have come on with that run under his belt. Keeps the 3kg claimer to help under the big weight and is a seven-time winner over this journey. Leading player. ROCKBARTON ANGEL (3) was in the money two starts back at Port Macquarie, then wasn't disgraced last time at Newcastle over 1500m after being in the firing line on the corner. Beautifully placed pack in trip and is sure to play a major role. TOOMUCHINFORMATION (11) has built nicely into this campaign and gets his chance to put it all together on the home track fourth-up. Can break a long run of outs. WHAT A RUSH (2) showed good early dash and raced on the speed last start before fading to finish back in fifth at Port Macquarie. Peaking now and is among the key chances.
